creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Brian <brian@brianwhalen.net> -----

Date: Fri, 24 Aug 2012 22:06:05 -0700
From: Brian <brian@brianwhalen.net>
To: freebsd-amd64@freebsd.org
Subject: pr amd64/171016

I am the submitter for this. I wanted to report additionally that the
image I used was the bootonly image. Netinst is Debian speak, and one
of those was next in the file list, and I erroneously looked at that.
Additionally, if I unselect all options, to do the 9.1 equiv of a
minimal install, I get to 98% of base and it just stops.

Brian

----- End forwarded message -----
